name: chestertons-fence
description: Chesterton's Fence — a stack-agnostic Claude Code plugin that stops AI from removing the fence before it knows why the fence is there.

plugins.name: chestertons-fence
plugins.description: A 6-step workflow (STOP → Identify → Investigate → Hypothesize → Decide → Document) that forces context-gathering (git blame, log, related code) before any deletion or refactor. Stack-agnostic — works on frontend, backend, infrastructure, schemas, migrations, and config. Based on G.K. Chesterton's 1929 parable.
